MultiLineIfElse:TodayActionBars.kt$buildString { append("$resolvedCount items") if (pendingCount > 0) append(" + $pendingCount en attente") append(" · $totalKcal kcal") }
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MainScreen.kt$HomeRoute.Search$/** @param inDraft true → result goes to draft; false → quick-add */
